Identification.LongTitle: An Act to establish Royal Canadian Mounted Police Day
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to establish Royal Canadian Mounted Police Day

Provision.Text: This enactment establishes the first day of February, in each year, as âRoyal Canadian Mounted Police Dayâ.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Royal Canadian Mounted Police Day Act.
Throughout Canada, in each year, the first day of February is to be known as âRoyal Canadian Mounted Police Dayâ.
